prompt: Create a photorealistic 16:9 daytime street scene in a fictional but realistic Japanese entertainment district resembling Shibuya or Akihabara, with a large white advertising truck centered in the composition driving through a wide crosswalk-lined road. The truck should be the main subject, angled three-quarters toward the viewer so both the front cab and the long side billboard are visible. Cover the truck’s side and upper billboard panels with bright anime-style promotional artwork for Erika Mizushima, a blonde blue-eyed swimsuit idol character, advertising her first photo book. Include Japanese ad copy on the truck such as はじまりの夏。 and a release line like 7.18 ON SALE, set in elegant cyan and pink typography over a tropical blue-sky beach background. Surround the road with tall commercial buildings packed with colorful vertical Japanese signs, karaoke signs, game center billboards, book store and cafe signage, huge anime posters, LED screens, and dense urban advertising; make the city feel busy but not based on a real exact location. Show a lively crowd of pedestrians on both sidewalks and at the crossing, with exactly 4 clearly visible foreground pedestrians holding smartphones up to photograph or film the ad truck: two on the left sidewalk and two on the right sidewalk. Add additional background pedestrians as a dense crowd, but keep them less detailed. Use bright summer sunlight, deep blue sky with scattered white clouds, crisp shadows, saturated colors, realistic asphalt texture, road lane markings, and a polished commercial-photo look. Keep the truck centered, sharp, and dominant; make the anime artwork vivid and readable while the background billboards remain slightly less important. Avoid logos from real brands and avoid watermarks.
